productDisplayName: Tantra Men's Tribal Blast Green T-shirt
description: CompositionMoss green round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Celebrate the universal oneness of our tribes with this cotton t-shirt from tantra.
